caption: In an indoor basketball gymnasium with polished wooden floors, a blue painted wall, and blue bleachers, a person wearing a pink shirt and dark shorts practices shooting a basketball. The scene begins with the person leaping into the air from the left side of the court, releasing the ball toward the hoop. In the next sequence, the person reaches the peak of their jump, with the basketball suspended in the air above them. As the action continues, the person begins to descend toward the court while the ball travels closer to the basketball hoop. Finally, the person lands on their feet on the wooden floor as the ball moves toward the rim. The basketball court features a green painted circular area and a black painted key. A basketball hoop with a white backboard and orange rim is visible in the upper section of the facility.
